name: Fillets of Flounder in Lemon Parsley Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 12 x 7-inch, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish. Add cornstarch, lemon juice, and parsley. Stir to blend well.
2. Dip each fillet in the butter sauce. Arrange in the baking dish with the butter sauce side up.
3. Sprinkle fillets with celery salt and pepper to taste. Cover loosely with clear plastic wrap and heat in Microwave Oven for 7 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
4. Let stand covered for 2 minutes to finish cooking. Spoon sauce over each serving.
